title: Fuller's PokePack: cobblemon / pokemon modpack
description: Cobblemon Pokemon Mod ft. Optimized Performance, Vanilla+, & Resource/Data Pack Collection!
body:
![Fuller's Pokepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ce9dbdcd1a7f90cc66fa2f2cd49e1c957901911_0.webp)

![Minecraft Version Label](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/NLXphieo?label=Minecraft%20Version&labelColor=242424&color=1e1e1e
) [![Modrinth Downloads Label](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/NLXphieo?logo=modrinth&labelColor=03190a&color=1e1e1e)]([https://modrinth.com/modpack/fullers-pokepack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fullers-pokepack)) [![Curseforge Downloads Label](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/842248?logo=curseforge&labelColor=241009&color=1e1e1e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fullers-pokepack)

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcaacf52a4b746d95f109a9193b4008f8ae75396.png)

**This modpack includes essentials for a performance optimized & Vanilla+ modded experience while playing the Cobblemon mod!**
ㅤ**Cobblemon** is a _**Pokémon × Minecraft**_ mod that offers many classic pokemon mechanics while also staying true to the Minecraft art style.
### This pack enhances the Vanilla Cobblemon experience with **Mods** + a _**Cobblemon Resource & Data Pack Collection**_, adding **almost every Pokemon!**.

The Included Mods provide the following:

- **Cobblemon 1.7.1**.
- Trainer Battle System (RCT)*
- All Battle Gimmicks (Up to SV)*
- Alpha Pokemon*
- Pokemon Spawn Level Scaling*
- Legends Arceus Esque Research Tasks
- TM, Tutor, & Egg Moves
- Minecraft Feature Backporting
- Decoration Blocks & Items
- Many New Small Cobblemon Features
- Vanilla+ Structures
- Free World Hosting (for small non-24/7 play)
- In-Game Documentation
- Controller Support
- Quality of Life Changes

\*Marked Features have been modified and their changes can be found elsewhere on the wiki.

![INSTALLATION](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b75bcd0e9fd370d140282585630518405f172aa.png)

Go to the **Versions** tab and choose one of the following:

- Release: The full modpack, includes Resource Packs and Datapacks!
- Beta: The LITE modpack, does not include Resource Packs and Datapacks.
- Alpha: The UNSTABLE modpack, includes untested features that may break your game. Proceed with caution and back up your worlds!

![RESOURCES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ef71543432c0f276051dfb194195913f470eff5.png)

## [FPP Wiki](https://github.com/FullerG-Verse/fullerspokepack/wiki)

## Bulbasaur Art by cytochrome (@cytosol on Discord)

![MULTIPLAYER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad0a04aa92fd73eccfd80f6db0c75d1691ecfb1f.png)

For a 24/7 Server **PLEASE** consider using [**THIS LINK**](https://lilypad.gg/gverse) to check out Lilypad! Using my link supports me GREATLY and helps me stay motivated to work on this modpack.
Servers start at $11/m.

Modpack also contains Essentials, a mod which allows for internet multiplayer with small groups.

![LINKS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26e8885cfea39e782694198a73a2101d8445ce00.png)
